title: Spanish Political Discourse Benchmark (SPDB)
description: Multilayer annotated corpus framework for Spanish political discourse. v0.1.0-alpha: annotation guidelines, codebook v1, JSON schemas, pipeline documentation, and an unannotated 100-unit ParlaMint pilot sample.

creators.name: Andres, Cesar
creators.affiliation: Universidad Internacional de La Rioja (UNIR), Spain

notes: Alpha release — not a gold benchmark. No annotated train/dev/test splits. DOI to be assigned after deposit.
